title: Archived run_dir contains no source code — deliverable is unreproducible from the archive
evidence: run_dir has only TASK.md/stack.json/scores.json/logs; no Cargo.toml, src/, tests/, or README.md. `find run_dir -not -path '*/target/*'` returns 6 non-source files. The code that scores.json (test_coverage=1.0) was computed from lives in the self-repair clone workspace /private/var/folders/.../retort-local-76rb7tam/retort-0f2422d0999c (Cargo.toml, src/{db,lib,main,models,routes}.rs, tests/integration_tests.rs, README.md), which was NOT copied into the archive and will be deleted on temp cleanup.
suggestion: Fix the archiver to copy the winning workspace (the successful self-repair clone) into runs/<cell>/rep1 instead of the empty first-attempt dir. Until fixed, this run's code is only recoverable from the temp clone.

title: First attempt produced zero files — local hermes write-guard refused all writes under /private/var/folders
evidence: _agent_stdout.log: '⚠️ File-mutation verifier: 1 file(s) were NOT modified ... Refusing to write to sensitive system path: /private/var/folders/.../retort-d88eeb957eb5/Cargo.toml'. The first-attempt workspace retort-d88eeb957eb5 has no source and no git commits ('No commits yet'). .hermes_usage.json shows completed=false. The run only passed because a self-repair clone (retort-0f2422d0999c) later wrote a full implementation.
evidence_note: Root cause is shared by archive-empty: the local runner's temp workspace path is classified as a sensitive system path by the write-guard.
suggestion: Whitelist the retort-local temp workspace root in the file-write guard so the agent can create source files on the first attempt; otherwise every local-hermes rust run depends on the repair fallback.

title: Required-field validation only rejects empty strings, not whitespace-only or absent fields
evidence: src/routes.rs:38-43 (repair workspace) validates with book.title.is_empty()/book.author.is_empty(); a title of '   ' passes. Absent title/author is rejected only incidentally via serde deserialization of the non-Option String fields (400 from actix Json extractor), not by explicit validation.
suggestion: Trim before the emptiness check and return a domain ValidationError for missing/blank fields.

title: 8 integration tests provided — exceeds the 'at least 3' requirement
evidence: tests/integration_tests.rs (repair workspace) defines 8 #[actix_web::test] fns covering health, create/list, get-by-id, update, delete, validation, 404, and author filter; all 8 pass (test_coverage=1.0).
suggestion: None — coverage of endpoints and error paths is good.

title: Very low token efficiency for the local model (0.108)
evidence: scores.json token_efficiency=0.108; .hermes_usage.json: 90 api_calls, total_tokens=4,509,661 (input 290k, cache_read 4.2M) for a small CRUD service, inflated by the failed first attempt plus the self-repair round.
suggestion: Informational — expected given the repair round; track across reps to see if the sandbox fix reduces call count.
